applicability_boundary.admitted_family: Gaussian-OU toy world generated by the existing lab toy-world generator.
applicability_boundary.deterministic_fallback_boundary: The canonical runner is called with use_torch=false; the experiment does not claim torch-trained representation coverage.
applicability_boundary.intervention_boundary: Intervention gaps are finite Gaussian-OU off-target flips induced by distinction-head operators only.
applicability_boundary.model: Script-private numpy logistic gap heads over replayed canonical latent z and distinction-head predictions.

gap_channel_metadata.definition: At least one held-out distinction probe predicts the wrong truth label.
gap_channel_metadata.name: prediction_error

gap_channel_metadata.definition: Minimum absolute distinction margin is below a train-split quantile.
gap_channel_metadata.name: low_margin

gap_channel_metadata.definition: At least one distinction truth label differs under the OU pair.
gap_channel_metadata.name: transition_unstable

gap_channel_metadata.definition: A target intervention flips at least one non-target distinction prediction.
gap_channel_metadata.name: off_target_intervention

negative_result_note: The gap head reduced UnloggedErrorRate relative to vanilla under the predeclared protocol; thresholds and beta were not tuned after observing outcomes.
